source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Compact English product UI with tabular incident numbers, dense labels, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese alert, signal, handoff, queue, status, and operations screens.
layout: Precise 8px alert grids, compact 8px cards, cup-rim focus rings, spore-speck texture, twig-brown dividers, dense incident tables, command search, status timelines, and dashboard/data panels tuned for fast scanning.

prompts.label: Transparent scarlet elf cup motif
prompts.workflow: built-in imagegen chroma-key source, local magenta-key removal
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a scarlet elf cup fungus motif for a Morphous design-system catalog, isolated as one complete fungi subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact cluster of scarlet cup fungus, also called scarlet elf cup, with vivid red inner cup surfaces, pale coral-red outer rims, slightly irregular cup edges, tiny spore-speck texture, damp moss green pads, and a small twig-brown woodland base. The identity must read clearly as scarlet cup fungus, not generic red flowers, berries, coral, chili peppers, morels, button mushrooms, or orange peel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include two to four cup forms, visible thin cup lips, moss cushions, and a short brown twig/root base without cropping. Clean studio light that preserves scarlet cup interiors, moss texture, damp woodland detail, and compact alert-system silhouette. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no forest scene, no soil bed beyond a minimal natural moss/twig base, no hand, no plate, no bowl, no label, no text, no watermark, no second species, no loose pile, no sliced mushrooms.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Elf Cup light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Elf Cup", derived from the scarlet elf cup fungus cutout visible in this conversation. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible compact alert system.
Canvas: 3840x2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional product design-system presentation. Use a precise grid, large readable labels, and avoid tiny dense text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Elf Cup, Scarlet Cup Fungus, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Alert Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from vivid scarlet cup interiors, pale coral cup rims, damp moss green pads, twig brown woodland base, bark umber cracks, wet spore speckles, compact cup silhouettes, and damp woodland contrast. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals taken from the motif: spore parchment, coral rim, scarlet cup, deep scarlet, moss green, wet moss olive, twig brown, bark umber, damp charcoal. Do not introduce unrelated colors.
Typography: English compact product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance. Include short readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use compact bilingual labels for alerts, incidents, signals, handoffs, queues, and operating metrics.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, alert cards, incident queue chips, status timeline, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, task table rows, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, status chips, spacing scale, 8px radius samples, border, shadow, subtle texture samples, icon buttons, theme token swatches, CSS variable snippets.
Style: compact alert system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, parchment light surfaces, scarlet primary actions, coral rim highlights, moss green support states, twig-brown structure, bark-umber separators, spore-speck texture, cup-rim focus rings, dense but scannable incident dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no one-note beige palette, no forest scene as the main content, no food menu, no restaurant branding, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Elf Cup", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Elf Cup dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Elf Cup" / "Scarlet Cup Fungus". Translate the same light design-system language visible in this conversation into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: 3840x2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, compact alert system mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Elf Cup, Scarlet Cup Fungus, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Alert Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the elf cup motif-derived palette roles from vivid scarlet cup interiors, deep scarlet shadows, pale coral cup rims, damp moss green pads, wet moss olive, twig brown woodland base, bark umber cracks, spore parchment, and damp charcoal depth. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals taken from the motif. The board must read as scarlet elf cup fungus, not generic red flowers, berries, chili peppers, restaurant, forest wallpaper, or generic black-and-red gaming UI.
Typography: English compact product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance. Include short readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use compact bilingual labels for alerts, incidents, signals, handoffs, queues, and operating metrics.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, alert cards, incident queue chips, status timeline, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, task table rows, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, status chips, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon buttons, theme token swatches.
Visual details: damp charcoal background, bark-umber panels, spore-parchment foreground text, scarlet primary actions, coral rim highlights, moss green support states, wet moss chart accents, twig-brown borders, subtle spore-speck and cup-rim texture overlays, thin coral focus rings, restrained contrast, crisp 8px shadcn/tweakcn controls and dashboards.
Constraints: no neon red, no generic pure-black gaming UI, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no unrelated saturated colors, no restaurant menu, no food packaging, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Elf Cup", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
